author: DominicVainMod
content:
@All Pings @Game Pings 

The Limited Honeyland Recipe is Live in SAGE Labs

There's 100 Honeyland x Star Atlas SFTs ready to craft in the Meta Crafting Station NOW! First come, first served. Remember, It's about being the first to START crafting, not about being the first to finish. Go get yours now while it's available!

For more information on this collaboration: ⁠📢┃announcements⁠

 5:20pm PT Edit: The SFT is now completely out, thank you all for the excitement. We already have some ideas to make this even better in the future!

 | https://based.staratlas.com/
